description: OT入侵偵測與資產可視化、SOC 24×7 SIEM/SOAR運營、NGFW/EDR/IAM/PAM，對齊IEC 62443與等保2.0三級。
description_en: OT intrusion detection and asset visibility, SOC 24×7 SIEM/SOAR operations, NGFW/EDR/IAM/PAM — aligned to IEC 62443 and 等保2.0三级.
description_zh-Hans: OT入侵侦测与资产可视化、SOC 24×7 SIEM/SOAR运营、NGFW/EDR/IAM/PAM，对齐IEC 62443与等保2.0三级。
